name: BB:UBA : Detect WannaCry Using URL
notes: This building block looks for URLs in the UBA : Malware Activity WannaCry - URL reference set. Any known URL related to WannaCry should be added to this table.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Detect WannaCry Using URL on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when any of URL (custom) are contained in any of UBA : Malware Activity WannaCry - URL's - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Detect WannaCry Using URL on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of URL (custom) are contained in any of UBA : Malware Activity WannaCry - URL's - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
